# sevalla_clusters (Data Source)

Use this data source to list all available Sevalla clusters.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sevalla_clusters" "all" {}

output "cluster_locations" {
  value = [for c in data.sevalla_clusters.all.clusters : c.display_name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `clusters` (Attributes List) The list of available clusters. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--clusters))

<a id="nestedatt--clusters"></a>
### Nested Schema for `clusters`

Read-Only:

- `display_name` (String) The display name of the cluster.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the cluster.
- `location` (String) The geographic location of the cluster.
- `name` (String) The system name of the cluster.
